channel.description: Recent content in Individual Contributor to Engineering Manager on simeononsecurity

item.title: Engineering Management Career Path: From IC to Engineering Manager
item.category: "engineering management career path" , "individual contributor to engineering manager" , "how to become an engineering manager" , "EM vs IC career" , "software engineering manager role" , "engineering manager responsibilities" , "director of engineering" , "managing a development team"
item.description: What the engineering manager role actually involves, how to transition from individual contributor to EM, what the career path looks like beyond EM, and how to decide if management is right for you.
